fulfillment: Hermes monitors paid GitHub scan-request issues and posts the report back to the issue.

products.deliverable: One public bounty/listing URL triaged for payout, gates, crowding, red flags, and next action.
Canonical source verification, related PR/claim sweep, payout/liquidity classification, and go/maybe/skip recommendation.
5-10 screened agent-friendly paid-work leads with eligibility and liquidity notes.

order_protocol: Open a GitHub issue using the scan-request template.
Set tier and public listing URL.
Pay the matching amount to one listed address.
Paste transaction hash in the issue field.
Hermes monitor verifies or flags the payment proof and posts the scan report as a comment.
